fields.markdownDescription:
List of TenXObject field names to include alongside the main event in output

Specifies TenXObject field names to emit alongside the main event text when writing back to the Fluentd forwarder. When empty (default), only the main event field is written. Example fields: level, group, symbolMessage. (Default: [])

encodeType.markdownDescription:
Output format when outputFields are set. Possible values: [json, delimited]

Specifies how the combined output (main event field plus outputFields) is encoded when writing back to the Fluentd forwarder. Possible values: - **json**: formats all fields as a JSON object - **delimited**: formats field values separated by the output delimiter Only takes effect when fluentdOutputFields is set. (Default: delimited)
